title: lobelia quadrangularis
intro: Lobelia quadrangularis, also known as Indian tobacco, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of lobelia quadrangularis include relief from respiratory problems such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce anxiety and stress. Lobelia quadrangularis can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, with the recommended dosage varying depending on the individual's health condition and the desired effect.
